name: Meta Business System
tagline: Market research platform — SQLite-backed intelligence with Reddit/Twitter/Google scraping, data visualization, and opportunity scoring
description: Automated market research engine that scrapes Reddit, Twitter, and Google for business opportunities. Stores everything in SQLite. Generates data visualizations with matplotlib. Scores opportunities for viability. From idea to market validation in minutes instead of weeks.
content_angles: Automated market research: scrapes Reddit, Twitter, Google for business signals
SQLite-backed intelligence platform with matplotlib data viz
From idea to market validation in minutes via AI-driven research
